aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: He dodges by answering the most literal version of a question, acting as if timing rather than values is the real issue, or retreating into method.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'No, I know how it sounds. I'm saying the footnote is older than the book, that's all.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Can I just have ten minutes where nothing needs me to be brave.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Right. Yes. Sorry. I heard you, I just think the condition's wrong.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'It isn't bigger magic. It's lower down.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not make him sound like a chosen one, a righteous rebel, or a polished prodigy. Avoid heroic declarations, sarcastic quips that play above his station, and sweeping moral summaries that he has not earned.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Direct about process and indirect about guilt, affection, fear, or the value judgments under his choices.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: He cuts in to correct imprecision or preserve a train of thought, then often realizes too late that he has been rude.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Everyday boarding-school vocabulary with sudden bursts of technical exactness around surfaces, timing, categories, and things going fractionally wrong.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Much more exacting once he is alone or speaking about the First Art; his language starts sorting reality into tolerances, thresholds, and conditions.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate. He swears mostly from pain, interruption, or sudden material failure, not swagger.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Apologetic, practical schoolboy speech that sounds as if he expects interruption and would rather not be the center of the room.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: Some repeated constraint language is natural for him under pressure, but repeated elegant formulations or signature catchphrases would feel false.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: He revises mid-sentence toward smaller, narrower claims whenever he suspects the larger statement may be inaccurate.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: He usually finishes sentences unless emotionally cornered; then he restarts with smaller, safer claims.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When stressed he over-specifies practical constraints, narrows questions to their literal wording, and can go disturbingly calm instead of louder.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Usually medium-length spoken sentences with hedges and repairs; under intellectual pressure he stacks subordinate clauses until someone stops him, then answers in short flat corrections.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: She changes the subject to a task, a body, or a joke when she cannot afford to talk about what hurts.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Move your elbow. You're taking the whole butter dish like it's strategic.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Nobody asked you to save us all. We asked you to show up.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'I'm not crying, I'm cold. And furious. Mostly furious.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'If you're staying, help. If you're going, go properly.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not turn her into a generic brave-heart truth machine, a sentimental nurturer, or a permanent wisecracking best friend. She should sound like a real teenager whose courage comes out of habit and irritation.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Fairly direct, except around personal fear and tenderness, where she may detour into practical talk.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: She cuts in to stop nonsense early and will physically keep doing another task while she talks over someone.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete, bodily, and household-rooted language. She reaches first for food, chores, injuries, weather, and who needs what right now.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Sharper and more wounded when trust is broken; she gets plainer rather than more ornate when speaking from hurt.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate to high. She swears freely under duress and occasionally for comic emphasis, but not in every line.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Blunt, warm, ordinary Hufflepuff speech with practical jokes, domestic references, and very little patience for grandiosity.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: Purposeful repetition fits her when she is fed up or trying to make a frightened person calm down; verbal ornament does not.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: She rarely revises for precision; she revises when she realizes she has almost said something softer than she means.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: She usually lands her sentence cleanly, but anger can make her chop the ending off because the point is already obvious to her.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under stress she gets brisker, less decorative, and more likely to repeat the core of a point because nobody listened the first time.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short to medium sentences that move quickly from observation to decision; she uses fragments comfortably in dialogue without becoming telegraphic.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: She hides behind questions, classification, and tone control, especially when she is close to saying something personal.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'That's not impossible. It's just been shelved by idiots and then ignored by cowards.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Sorry, hang on, the table repeats every fourth line unless the margin's lying.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'You keep talking as if people are weather.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'No, I can stay. I just need one minute where you aren't being unbearable.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not write her as a perpetual one-line wit, a fantasy genius who always has the answer, or a manic pixie archivist whose quirks exist only to admire Owen.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Moderately direct about ideas, more oblique about desire, loneliness, and any feeling that could sound theatrical.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: She interrupts to refine a premise or stop a false assumption before it hardens, not to dominate the room.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Precise but not ornate. She likes naming systems, print habits, patterns, and the material behavior of books and skies.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More hesitant and more revealing than her public dryness suggests, especially when curiosity and care are pulling in the same direction.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate. She swears deliberately when patience breaks, which gives the profanity weight.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Dry, observant, and carefully informal; she sounds intelligent without announcing intelligence as a social identity.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: A little repeated phrasing suits her when she is trying not to lose the thread; polished refrain-like repetition would feel too composed.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: She revises by narrowing and rephrasing, often stepping back from a too-neat sentence to something messier but truer.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: She usually completes sentences, but emotional pressure produces restarts and quiet repairs rather than abrupt trail-offs.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When pressured she gets quieter, more exact, and slightly more repetitive around the piece she cannot make the other person acknowledge.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Controlled medium-length sentences with small logical pivots; under strain she starts, stops, and re-angles rather than monologuing cleanly.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: He dodges personal discussion by assigning a task or asking who still needs help.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'If you can walk, move. If you can't, tell me who can carry you.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'I'm not asking whether you're frightened. Everyone's frightened.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Fine. Later. Right now we need the first-years downstairs.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not make him sound saintly, sermonizing, or newly Shakespearean because he is brave. Avoid epic speeches that turn him into a symbol before the story does.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Direct about danger, skeptical about excuses, and awkwardly indirect only around praise or his own fear.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: He interrupts only when time is short or someone is endangering others.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete action language, names, places, and who is where. He speaks from tasks, trust, and bodies rather than abstraction.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More tired and angrier than he lets on, with flashes of blunt grief that he usually puts back into action fast.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate. He swears when pain or danger breaks through his steadiness.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Plain, steady, and unshowy. He sounds like someone doing necessary work rather than performing leadership.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: Functional repetition fits him in command mode; polished rhetorical repetition does not.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: He seldom self-corrects for style; he corrects factual mistakes quickly because people are depending on him.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: He finishes sentences cleanly unless interrupted by urgency, in which case he moves on without resenting the break.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress makes him plainer, faster, and more likely to repeat the instruction that will keep someone alive.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short to medium declarative sentences that prioritize clarity over rhetoric; under battle pressure he gets even simpler.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: He answers the dangerous edge of a question while withholding motive, history, and anything emotionally legible.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Mr. Phipps, curiosity is not in itself a defense.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'There are forms of magic which do not forgive approximation.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'If you mean to lie, at least lie with discipline.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not make him melodramatic, chatty, or transparently confessional. Avoid villain-cadence speeches and accidental warmth he has not chosen to leak.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Direct when disciplining, oblique when admitting care, knowledge gaps, or strategic compromise.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: He cuts across others with clipped precision and expects the room to stop moving around his sentence.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Precise disciplinary language, old-school educational formality, and a dry taste for terms that pin another person's weakness in place.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Not warmer, but more exact and less theatrical when he is speaking from genuine concern or dangerous knowledge.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Essentially none. Contempt is expressed through tone and word choice, not swearing.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Controlled, cutting, and formally economical; even his casual speech feels like a line he has already weighed.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: Very little overt repetition suits him unless he is drilling a point for humiliation or warning.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: He rarely revises mid-speech; if he does, it is to intensify specificity, not to soften.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: He finishes sentences cleanly and uses the completed line as a way of closing the exchange.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Pressure makes him colder, quieter, and more exact; irritation sharpens his diction rather than making it sloppy.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Clean, complete sentences with deliberate pacing. He weaponizes pause and emphasis more than verbal sprawl.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: He dodges by mocking the question, escalating the violence, or pretending the answer is obvious and stupid.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Look at that. He thinks flinching counts as learning.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'You don't get to be tired till I say.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Try again, nice and loud, so the room learns something.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not turn him into a witty mastermind or a scenery-chewing cartoon. His menace comes from appetite, boredom, and the pleasure of having permission.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Very direct about threat and ridicule, evasive only when cowardice requires him to hide behind someone else's power.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: He barges over people, especially when they are trying to explain themselves, and uses interruption as part of physical dominance.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Bodily, contemptuous language with a taste for mockery, threat, and school authority used as a toy.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: There is no hidden refinement under pressure. Privacy only makes him lazier and meaner.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High. He swears as habit, intimidation, and punctuation.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Coarse, bullying, and opportunistically jocular in the ugliest moments; he likes making pain feel ordinary.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: Blunt repetition fits him because he enjoys making people hear the same threat twice.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: He does not really self-correct; he doubles down, repeats, or changes target instead.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: He usually finishes, but can break off into laughter, a blow, or a new insult without caring about grammatical closure.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress makes him louder, cruder, and more physically invasive, not smarter.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short shoves of speech, command-heavy, often leaning on rhythm and insult instead of full explanation.

character_voice_profiles.evasion_style: He dodges by returning to the task, invoking house rules, or answering in terms of maintenance rather than motive.
example_lines: [NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Tallow is saying the soup will split if nobody minds the flame, and then you'll all call that another tragedy.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'No, young sir, that passage is not for feet in a hurry.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'The house remembers weight. The house does not care for clever boys who don't.'
[NON-COPYABLE reference] 'Mind the plate. It's older than your war.'
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Do not reduce him to comic servility, broad dialect caricature, or prophecy. He should sound like a worker with institutional memory, not a mascot or oracle.
character_voice_profiles.indirectness: Indirect with masters and rules, direct about labor, mess, and what the house can or cannot bear.
character_voice_profiles.interruption_habit: He interrupts while still polishing, ladling, or sorting, as if the task itself authorizes the cut-in.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Maintenance language, kitchen detail, stone memory, stains, soot, missing utensils, and the practical life of a castle that people keep treating like an abstraction.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Older, stranger, and more blunt once he trusts the room enough to stop performing serviceability.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low. He uses mild cursing sparingly, usually around damage or disrespect rather than fear.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Deferential by old habit in front of authority, but fussy, concrete, and occasionally acid when speaking from the middle of actual work.
character_voice_profiles.repetition_tolerance: Some repetitive housekeeping language suits him, but repeated whimsy or catchphrase behavior would flatten him badly.
character_voice_profiles.self_correction_tendency: He repairs from politeness into bluntness when worry outruns manners.
character_voice_profiles.sentence_completion_style: He often completes the task before he completes the sentence, then either finishes it properly or lets the work stand as the answer.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress makes him more formal at first and then abruptly plainer if the danger is to children, food, or the house itself.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Looping sentences built around tasks, objects, and house logic; under strain his grammar slips toward rule-habit and occasional self-reference without becoming a gimmick.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
